top_signals.action: Switch PrayerLock/scripture-streak primary offer to weekly plan + trial. Expected: 2-4x revenue vs monthly-only.

top_signals.signal: First $100 iOS app revenue via ASO changes after 6 weeks of zero. ASO fix = immediate downloads.
top_signals.action: Run ASO audit on all live app factory apps NOW. Title, subtitle, keywords need optimization.

top_signals.signal: Organic YouTube channel drives 120 downloads/week when App Store fails. ASO is not reliable distribution.

top_signals.signal: When competitor copies and halves price ($29 vs $59), brand/trust wins. Never race to bottom.
top_signals.action: Pre-position all digital products on brand trust. Build testimonials NOW before competition arrives.
